roles.title: Engineering Manager, Agent Prompts & Evals
roles.why_match: Directly aligns with the candidate's Director of Quality Engineering background. This team owns eval frameworks, system prompt pipelines, and regression-detection systems for every Claude model launch — essentially a quality engineering function for AI/ML systems. Leading a team at the intersection of platform engineering and model behavior maps squarely to Priority #2 (Head of Quality Engineering for AI/ML systems) and the candidate's 21+ years of engineering leadership experience managing large quality orgs.

roles.title: Engineering Manager, Vertical AI Products (Multiple Roles — Financial Services, Life Sciences, Healthcare)
roles.why_match: Anthropic is hiring Engineering Managers to build 0→1 AI products for enterprise verticals including financial services — directly relevant given the candidate's background at a large financial institution. The role requires leading teams building agentic AI products, working with model evals, and driving compliance/platform-readiness, aligning with Priority #4 (Director/VP Engineering with explicit AI/ML/agent platform scope) and the candidate's domain expertise.

roles.title: Manager, Forward Deployed Engineering
roles.why_match: Founding leadership role building and scaling the FDE practice that defines how enterprises adopt AI at scale. Requires hiring/developing teams, setting technical and operational bars, and building repeatable AI deployment playbooks — a strong match for Priority #3 (AI Transformation Lead / AI Program Lead) and the candidate's org-building and cross-functional leadership experience at a large institution.

roles.title: Manager of Applied AI Architecture, Enterprise Tech (Cyber)
roles.location: San Francisco, CA or New York City, NY
roles.why_match: Manages a team of Applied AI Architects driving frontier AI adoption across the cybersecurity industry. Requires 5+ years leading solution architect teams through hypergrowth (10→50+ people) and executive engagement on AI/ML platforms — aligns with Priority #5 (Solutions Architect leadership-track role focused on AI/ML) and the candidate's experience leading a ~40-person engineering org.

roles.title: Manager of Applied AI Architecture, Partnerships
roles.location: San Francisco, CA or New York City, NY
roles.why_match: Leads a team of Partner Solutions Architects enabling GSIs (Accenture, Deloitte) and cloud partners (AWS, GCP, Azure) to deploy Anthropic's AI products. Requires building and scaling pre-sales technical teams and driving AI adoption strategy — a strong match for Priority #5 (senior/leadership-track Solutions Architect role) given the candidate's large-org leadership and financial-sector credibility.

roles.title: Head of Product Engineering
roles.why_match: VP/Head-level role reporting to the CPO, overseeing all user-facing product engineering at scale (350+ person org target). Requires 9+ years as an engineering leader including VP-level experience, scaling large engineering organizations, and guiding architectural decisions — a top-priority match (#1 Director/VP AI Platform Engineering) for a candidate with 21+ years of engineering leadership experience directing a large org.

roles.title: Technical Program Manager, Research
roles.team: Technical Program Management / AI Research & Engineering
roles.why_match: Senior TPM role spanning the full AI model development lifecycle (pre-training, post-training, alignment, evals, compute). Requires reasoning about technical tradeoffs across model architecture and training infrastructure, and influencing senior technical staff — aligns with Priority #3 (AI Program Lead) for a candidate pivoting toward AI-adjacent leadership and bringing cross-functional program governance experience from a large institution.

roles.title: Technical Program Manager, Compute
roles.why_match: Owns critical programs across Anthropic's AI compute infrastructure lifecycle (procurement, capacity allocation, workload coordination across cloud providers and hardware). Requires partnering with engineering and research leadership and driving alignment on compute resources — aligns with Priority #3/5 (AI Program Lead / AI infra leadership) for a candidate with large-org operational leadership experience.
